tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: My grandfather, communism, and the tremor that never left. A story I rarely share. He was the principal of a private school; respected, steady, a man who believed in books and order. Then, one ordinary afternoon, his world ended. A squad of communist troops stormed on to campus grounds. They herded the children out like cattle, set every book ablaze in the courtyard. “Less educated people are easier to control,” they believed. They dragged my grandfather and his staff to the side of a dusty road, forced them to their knees, hands bound tight behind their backs. One by one, the executions began. The crack of pistols split the air. Each body fell with a heavy thud into the dirt. Each crack of the pistol meant it was getting closer to his demise. My grandfather stared straight ahead as the man beside him collapsed. He felt the warm steel of the pistol press against the back of his skull. Time slowed. This was it, the final second of his life. Then, fate intervened. He lifted his eyes and saw a column of troops marching down the road. At its head walked a general. A childhood friend. With a scream of desperation, he called out his name. The general was startled but recognized my grandfather and immediately spared his life. Tears streamed down his face. His entire body shook violently as he sprinted home. He grabbed his wife and children with nothing but the clothes on their backs and fled that very hour, leaving behind their home, their belongings, their entire life. Everything was taken away by the regime in a single afternoon. From that day forward, an uncontrollable tremor gripped his right hand. It was particularly noticeable whenever his emotions got the better of him. The shaking never stopped. It followed him across oceans and time until the day he passed. That is communism. It is not theory, not idealism, but the pistol at the back of the head, the burning books, the shattered lives. Do not let anyone sell you a nightmare dressed up as a wonderful dream. The people now sowing socialist and communist poison in America are exactly what President Trump warned: the greatest threat to our free world. On this 250th birthday of the United States, let one survivor’s grandson say it plainly and without apology: COMMUNISM MUST NEVER BE ALLOWED TO SPREAD IN THESE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA. 🇺🇸​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ MAY GOD BLESS AMERICA.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：我的祖父，共产主义，以及从未离开过的颤抖。一个我很少分享的故事。他是一所私立学校的校长；受人尊敬、稳重、相信书籍和秩序的人。然后，一个平常的下午，他的世界结束了。一队共产党军队冲进校园。他们把孩子们像赶牛一样赶了出去，把院子里的每一本书都烧了。 “受教育程度较低的人更容易控制，”他们相信。他们把我的祖父和他的手下拖到一条尘土飞扬的路边，强迫他们跪下，双手紧紧地绑在背后。一名又一名的处决开始了。手枪的爆响划破了空气。每个尸体都重重地倒在泥土里。手枪的每一声爆响都意味着他离死亡越来越近。当我祖父旁边的那个人倒下时，他直视前方。他感觉到手枪温暖的钢压在他的后脑勺上。时间变慢了。这就是他生命的最后一秒。然后，命运介入了。他抬起头，看见一队军队正沿着道路行进。为首的是一位将军。儿时的朋友。带着绝望的尖叫，他喊出了自己的名字。将军大吃一惊，但认出了我祖父，立即饶了他一命。泪水从他的脸上流下来。他全身剧烈颤抖着，飞快地跑回家。他抓住妻子和孩子，除了背上的衣服外，什么也没带走，就在那个时刻逃离了，留下了他们的家、他们的财物和他们的整个生活。一个下午，一切就被政权夺走了。从那天起，他的右手就开始不受控制地颤抖起来。每当他的情绪占上风时，这一点就尤其明显。震动从未停止过。它跟随他穿越海洋和时间，直到他去世的那一天。那就是共产主义。这不是理论，不是理想主义，而是后脑勺的手枪，焚烧的书籍，支离破碎的生命。不要让任何人向你推销一场伪装成美好梦想的噩梦。现在在美国播撒社会主义和共产主义毒药的人们正是特朗普总统所警告的：对我们自由世界的最大威胁。在美国诞辰 250 周年之际，让一位幸存者的孙子毫无歉意地直言不讳地说：绝不能允许共产主义在这些美利坚合众国传播。 🇺🇸​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​愿上帝保佑美国。

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: SpaceXAI has become a major force for good in Memphis and surrounding communities. • SpaceXAI’s expansion is projected to push local tax revenue above $100 million • Employs almost 3,000 people locally in Memphis • The Musk Foundation donated $350,000 to Boys & Girls Clubs of Greater Memphis • Has paid tens of millions of dollars in property taxes to Memphis and Shelby County • Spent $10 million in 2025 with Memphis restaurants and food vendors • Starlink is also giving eligible Memphis-area residents half-price service. • 80% of the construction workforce was hired from the Memphis community • Hired thousands of subcontractors and works with local Memphis vendors/businesses • Provides free meals around the clock for employees and contractors • 25% of SpaceXAI property tax revenue is set aside for nearby communities • Building an $80 million Colossus Water Recycling Plant. The plant is expected to treat around 13 million gallons of wastewater per day that will save about 4.745 billion gallons of potable water every year. • Built electrical substations at no cost to MLGW • Installed 240+ batteries for on-site energy storage and grid support • Partnered with Memphis-Shelby County Schools on upgrades near its facilities • MSCS accepted an in-kind Musk Foundation donation, previously reported around $6M, for school repairs and student support • Removed major debris from local roads, including 300+ mattresses, 500 truck tires and 15,000+ lbs of waste • SpaceXAI cleanup efforts have removed 100+ tons of garbage and debris • Partnered with Mt. Vernon Baptist Church to support a new community center fundraiser • SpaceXAI team members volunteered at Mid-South Food Bank and helped assemble 7,000 Christmas baskets • Offers $25,000 signing bonuses for new hires relocating to Shelby County • Offers $10,000 bonuses for workers moving to nearby Mississippi or Arkansas SpaceXAI is not just building AI in Memphis. It is investing in jobs, schools, infrastructure, cleanups, local businesses, families and the surrounding community.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：SpaceXAI 已成为孟菲斯及周边社区造福的主要力量。 • SpaceXAI 的扩张预计将推动当地税收超过 1 亿美元 • 在孟菲斯当地雇用近 3,000 名员工 • 马斯克基金会向大孟菲斯的男孩和女孩俱乐部捐赠 35 万美元 • 已向孟菲斯和谢尔比县缴纳数千万美元的财产税 • 2025 年在孟菲斯的餐馆和食品供应商上花费了 1,000 万美元 • Starlink 还向符合资格的人提供资助孟菲斯地区居民半价服务。 • 80% 的建筑工人是从孟菲斯社区雇佣的 • 雇用了数千名分包商并与孟菲斯当地供应商/企业合作 • 为员工和承包商全天候提供免费餐点 • SpaceXAI 财产税收入的 25% 拨给附近社区 • 建造一座耗资 8,000 万美元的 Colossus 水回收厂。该工厂预计每天处理约 1300 万加仑废水，每年将节省约 47.45 亿加仑饮用水。 • MLGW 免费建造变电站 • 安装了 240 多个电池，用于现场储能和电网支持 • 与孟菲斯-谢尔比县学校合作，对其设施附近进行升级 • MSCS 接受了马斯克基金会的实物捐赠（此前报道称约为 600 万美元），用于学校维修和学生支持 • 清除了当地道路上的主要碎片，包括 300 多个床垫、500 个卡车轮胎和 15,000 多磅废物 • SpaceXAI 的清理工作已清除了 100 多吨垃圾和碎片 • 与弗农山浸信会教堂 (Mt. Vernon Baptist Church) 合作，支持新的社区中心筹款活动 • SpaceXAI 团队成员在中南食品银行做志愿者，帮助组装了 7,000 个圣诞篮 • 为搬迁到谢尔比县的新员工提供 25,000 美元的签约奖金 • 为搬到附近密西西比州或阿肯色州的工人提供 10,000 美元的奖金SpaceXAI 不仅仅在孟菲斯构建人工智能。它投资于就业、学校、基础设施、清洁、当地企业、家庭和周边社区。

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: #CZ访谈关键点总结 🔸这是 The Block 新节目《The Starting Block》EP1（2026年6月29日阿布扎比现场直播） 🔸主持人 Gareth Jenkinson（The Block多媒体负责人）对 CZ（Changpeng Zhao） 进行约1小时8分钟的深度专访。 🔸1️⃣ 个人投资与X（Twitter）CZ曾投资约 5亿美元 支持埃隆·马斯克收购Twitter（现X），认为言论自由是“货币自由”的前提。 希望X未来能实现原生全球支付功能，打破Stripe、PayPal等地域限制（但目前X Money专注法币）。 🔸2️⃣ #Binance 成功秘诀与用户至上核心竞争力：强大团队 + 高速安全撮合引擎 + BNB激励 + 激进联盟计划。 关键在于用户保护：即使短期亏损（如中国禁令时动用40%国库返还用户资金），也赢得长期信任。“用户知道你是否在保护他们，这就是关键。” 🔸3️⃣ 监狱经历（最重磅部分）服刑 4个月（美国银行保密法违规），原本预期是软禁。 监狱系统复杂（美国有53套不同规则），不确定性最让人焦虑。 为保护自己加入太平洋岛民团体，未遭遇敲诈。 与Prison Professors创始人Michael Santos结缘，捐款200万美元（每6个月50万），推动区块链教育进入监狱，帮助囚犯重返社会、打破犯罪循环。 反思：如果现在重新来过，会直接阻止美国未持牌用户访问（“ask forgiveness, not permission”策略在法庭上被反噬）。 🔸4️⃣ 监管与合规欧洲MiCA申请受政治因素影响（如希腊申请撤回，传闻与ECB有关）。 成功案例：日本2023年拿下牌照；Binance US自2019年起独立运营，已恢复银行合作。 强调合规重要性，同时批评部分监管“双标”（KYC不一致）。 🔸5️⃣ AI、竞争与行业未来常用AI工具：Ki（简单便宜）、ChatGPT、Claude等；认为AI可将开发速度提升20-50%，但代码必须人工审核安全。 对 Hyperliquid 等新竞争者持开放态度：“希望他们成功，提供更高自由度”。 预测市场（如Polymarket、Kalshi）非常看好，美国监管支持，预测结果比传统民调更准确。 🔸6️⃣ 比特币与加密行业展望极度看多比特币，遵循4年周期，已经历4次“加密冬天”。 不是比特币 maxi：多链共存（10-30条甚至更多）才能促进创新，比特币网络拥堵限制了可编程性。 比特币价格：不做具体预测，但按每周期3-5倍增长，2033年可能接近100万美元（市场仍远未饱和）。 行业将继续发展，AI会加速区块链进步。 🔸7️⃣ 个人心态与当下重点不太在意外界“legacy”（遗产），只想自己临终前能说“我尽力了”。 当前专注：帮助其他创始人、慈善（监狱教育）、政府加密监管咨询、Easy Labs投资（包括BNB Treasury相关事务，已解决部分问题）。 想被记住为 “the crypto guy”（加密圈那个人）。 🔸🔶🔸观后感🔹🔷🔹 看完这场访谈，最打动我的不是CZ的财富或昔日“币圈首富”光环，而是他历经牢狱之灾后依然保持的清醒、韧性与建设者心态。 他把监狱经历讲得异常平静，却毫不回避自己的反思和后悔——这比任何励志故事都真实。 捐200万美元推动监狱区块链教育，不是作秀，而是真正想“打破犯罪循环”，让人看到一个曾经叱咤风云的创始人，依然在用实际行动回馈社会。 他对Binance成功的复盘非常务实：用户信任 > 短期利润。这也是为什么Binance能熬过多次危机至今仍是CEX之王的原因。 最令人振奋的是他对未来的乐观——比特币周期论、多链创新、预测市场、AI与区块链结合……他没有空谈牛市，而是给出清晰的底层逻辑。 尤其是那句“我不在意别人怎么记住我，只想自己能说‘我尽力了’”，朴实却有力量。 这场访谈不仅是《The Starting Block》的精彩开局，更是给整个加密行业的一剂强心针：真正的建设者，从不被短期挫折定义。 CZ用行动证明，加密的未来，属于那些既能低头反思、又能抬头看远的人。 🔸完整视频：YouTube搜索 “The Starting Block - Live with CZ in Abu Dhabi” 或原帖链接 https://x.com/i/status/2071566272798884323 @cz_binance #Binance #BNB @heyibinance
Tried, couldn't reserve that name. So, definitely not me. 🤣
tweets.translated: 试过了，无法保留该名称。所以，绝对不是我。 🤣

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: CZ on Binance's regulatory scars and Why he's not worried 🇯🇵 Japan banned Binance in 2018. By 2023, Binance had a full license and SoftBank as a shareholder. 🇸🇬 Singapore forced Binance out in 2021. Users fled to FTX. We all know how that ended. 🇪🇺 On Europe: "It's a loss for Binance. It's also a loss for Europe. It's a lose-lose situation." Binance is the most scrutinized Exchange in crypto and also one of the most compliant. Get banned. Get compliant. Get invited back. History says Binance has done this before. Pressure today. Licenses tomorrow. That's the Binance pattern. @cz_binance @heyibinance @_RichardTeng @cz_binance
tweets.translated: @cz_binance 的 RT：CZ 谈到币安的监管伤痕以及他为什么不担心🇯🇵日本在 2018 年禁止了币安。到 2023 年，币安获得了完整的牌照，软银成为股东。 🇸🇬新加坡在 2021 年迫使币安退出。用户逃往 FTX。我们都知道事情是如何结束的。 🇪🇺关于欧洲：“这是币安的损失。这也是欧洲的损失。这是一个双输的局面。”币安是加密货币领域受到最严格审查的交易所，也是最合规的交易所之一。被禁止吧遵守规定。被邀请回来。历史表明，币安以前就这样做过。今天有压力。明天拿执照。这就是币安模式。 @cz_binance @heyibinance @_RichardTeng @cz_binance

tweets.content: Pinned: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 已固定：民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: $SIVE is raising ~$61M (600M SEK) to expand manufacturing capacity for InP lasers and optical amplifiers. Sivers operates as a fab-lite model so this is likely hinting at foundry allocation/scaling for CW DFB laser ramp across Jabil, and their other partners. It could also point to broader foundry allocation/scaling beyond the already announced WIN partnership. My feedback is that it's very bullish if it's comprised of long-only institutions and there's no heavy discount (30 day VWAP). Otherwise, would need to reaccess if there's arb or short term investors. This is the perfect time to get ideal strategic investors like $GFS on the cap table. As well as focusing on having more US institutional support. Especially considering $56M is a small check to a single US institution that want photonics exposure (eg. look at Poet's $400M registered direct offering for sentiment). A lot of it is "it depends when more info comes out", but this looks like a very positive signal for mass production given Siver's fab-lite models.
tweets.translated: $SIVE 正在筹集约 6100 万美元（6 亿瑞典克朗），用于扩大 InP 激光器和光学放大器的制造能力。 Sivers 以精简晶圆厂模式运营，因此这可能暗示捷普及其其他合作伙伴的 CW DFB 激光坡道代工厂分配/规模扩大。它还可能表明，除了已经宣布的 WIN 合作伙伴关系之外，还有更广泛的代工分配/规模扩大。我的反馈是，如果它由只做多的机构组成并且没有大幅折扣（30 天 VWAP），那么它是非常看涨的。否则，如果有套利或短期投资者，则需要重新进入。现在是让像 $GFS 这样的理想战略投资者进入股权结构表的最佳时机。并注重获得更多美国机构的支持。特别是考虑到 5600 万美元对于一家希望涉足光子学领域的美国机构来说只是一笔小额支票（例如，看看 Poet 的 4 亿美元注册直接发行以表达情绪）。其中很多是“这取决于更多信息何时出现”，但考虑到 Siver 的 fab-lite 模型，这对于大规模生产来说似乎是一个非常积极的信号。

tweets.content: Yep! Agility Robotics is currently my favorite humanoid/robotics position. They're set to be listed on NASDAQ via $CCXI as early as September (per Digitimes). Just for informational purposes: Their V4 humanoid robot is already operating in sites like Amazon. And have V5 slated for mass production next year (they have a 10,000+ /year capacity). Investors include Foxconn, $NVDA, $AMZN, Softbank, and now Serenity. I've been personally waiting for humanoid exposure for awhile (Agility is set to be the first US pure-play listed one) to the point I was actually planning on investing in Unitree's IPO. But I'm glad now I personally have a compelling alternative now since I prefer to invest capital to build up Made in America supply chains (75% of their components are US-sourced from investor desks). There are risks assigned to SPACs such as listing delays, or cancellation. But excited to see what happens next with developments. I do hope this encourages other frontier companies to go public early on.
tweets.translated: 是的！敏捷机器人是目前我最喜欢的人形/机器人职位。他们最早将于 9 月通过 $CCXI 在纳斯达克上市（据 Digitimes 报道）。仅供参考：他们的 V4 人形机器人已经在亚马逊等网站上运行。 V5 预计明年量产（年产能超过 10,000 辆）。投资者包括富士康、$NVDA、$AMZN、软银以及现在的 Serenity。我个人等待人形机器人的曝光已经有一段时间了（Agility 将成为第一个在美国上市的纯游戏），以至于我实际上计划投资 Unitree 的 IPO。但我很高兴现在我个人有了一个令人信服的选择，因为我更愿意投资资金来建立美国制造的供应链（其 75％ 的组件是从投资者柜台采购的美国）。 SPAC 存在上市延迟或取消等风险。但很高兴看到接下来会发生什么。我确实希望这能鼓励其他前沿公司尽早上市。

tweets.content: I wonder if humanoids is going to spark a new bottleneck/industry for robot cosmetics. Like a skin bottleneck. Or Aespa KPOP robot makeover as a service. So if $TSLA Optimus makes tens of millions of humanoids: Who’s going to make them all look hot?
tweets.translated: 我想知道类人机器人是否会引发机器人化妆品的新瓶颈/行业。就像皮肤瓶颈一样。或者 Aespa KPOP 机器人改造服务。因此，如果 TSLA Optimus 制造了数千万个类人机器人：谁会让它们看起来很性感？
